overview: NewsRec AI is a full-stack AI-powered news recommendation platform with Internet Identity authentication, personalized feeds powered by TF-IDF and collaborative filtering, a modern Google News/YouTube-style UI, article search, and user-submitted article uploads with content validation.
features: Internet Identity authentication with personalized user profiles
Personalized homepage with 3 dynamic sections: Recommended for You, Trending Now, Based on Your Interests
Hybrid recommendation engine using TF-IDF, cosine similarity, and collaborative filtering
Full-text and category-based search with search history
Article upload with real-time NLP validation and spam detection
Responsive Google News / YouTube-style card UI with sidebar navigation
Interaction tracking (likes, reads) that continuously updates recommendations
